actions: Task3: Fixed PropensityBalanceInterpreter - replaced pd.wide_to_long (required W0/W1 cols) with pd.melt, replaced hard-coded .query('v0==True') with dynamic treatment_col. Branch: repo-assist/fix-issue-802-propensity-balance-interpreter. PR TBD.
